style_enforcement: anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism
negative_enforcement: No text, no watermark, no live action
video_negative_enforcement: Avoid dialogue, heavy lip sync, extra characters, text, and watermark

brand_palette.visual_identity: dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: mostly graphite gray and near-black, faint cyber pink glow, tiny icy cyan reflections
color_balance_by_stage.development: graphite gray base with restrained neon magenta light trails and subtle icy cyan reflections
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger neon magenta and cyber pink glow balanced by cool icy cyan reflections
color_balance_by_stage.climax: high-energy neon magenta and cyber pink dominance, silver-white rim light, controlled icy cyan contrast
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: softened cyber pink glow with silver-white highlights and faint icy cyan reflections
